name: IRS Whistleblower Award Program

eligibility.description: Applies if the individual's gross income exceeds $200,000 for the year in question and the total proceeds in dispute exceed $2,000,000. Information must be submitted under penalty of perjury.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Individuals who provide original information to the IRS regarding tax underpayments or fraud can receive a mandatory award of 15% to 30% of the proceeds collected.
